Who we are

A builder and a marketplace, under one trusted brand

Sopodiva blends technology, construction, and service aggregation across African markets — bridging digital discovery with real-world execution.

Technology

A mobile-first platform for discovery, booking, and trust — built for the phones people actually use.

Construction

A full-service build arm for private clients and public works, from drawing to delivery.

Aggregation

Verified artisans, real ratings, and transparent pricing before any work begins.

Our model

One company, two doors

Find the right professional yourself — or hand us the whole project.

Door 1 · Marketplace

Find & hire

  • Africa's structured directory for building & repairs
  • Verified contractors, handymen & builders
  • Ratings, reviews & transparent pricing
Browse verified artisans
Door 2 · Construction

Build & deliver

  • Residential & commercial construction
  • Public infrastructure & civil works
  • Turnkey, end-to-end project delivery
Hand us a project

Technology

A mobile-first platform that scales with the continent

Discovery and trust on the devices people already carry — search, filter, and match in a few taps, with quality scored from real outcomes on real jobs.

Explore the marketplace

Who we serve

Built for everyone shaping Africa's spaces

Homeowners & developers

Families and property developers building or maintaining homes.

Government & public sector

Agencies delivering infrastructure and civic works.

SMEs & corporates

Businesses needing reliable build and facility services.

Diaspora investors

Africans abroad building back home, with trusted oversight.

Why we win

The only player that finds the artisan and does the work

Marketplace + execution

Discovery and delivery under one accountable roof.

First-mover advantage

A structured contractor-aggregation platform for Africa.

The Sopodiva name

A trusted brand committed to quality and accountability.

Local + global standards

Local expertise, executed to international quality bars.

Ready to build, repair, or get verified?

Tell us what you need. We match you with a verified artisan, or take the whole project off your hands.
